creator: jrtc27@freebsd.org
text: FreeBSD should probably have the XDG_RUNTIME_DIR one, too, otherwise I don't think you'll be able to launch a Plasma (Wayland) session straight from SDDM, unless the recent SDDM release does things differently or there's something I'm missing about ConsoleKit? I couldn't obviously find where it would otherwise be set in a non-(e)logind world.
